2604.17406.title: EvoMaster: A Foundational Agent Framework for Building Evolving Autonomous Scientific Agents at Scale
2604.17406.paper_summary: The convergence of large language models and agents is catalyzing a new era of scientific discovery: Agentic Science. While the scientific method is inherently iterative, existing agent frameworks are predominantly static, narrowly scoped, and lack the capacity to learn from trial and error. To bridge this gap, we present EvoMaster, a foundational evolving agent framework engineered specifically for Agentic Science at Scale. Driven by the core principle of continuous self-evolution, EvoMaster empowers agents to iteratively refine hypotheses, self-critique, and progressively accumulate knowledge across experimental cycles, faithfully mirroring human scientific inquiry. Crucially, as a domain-agnostic base harness, EvoMaster is exceptionally easy to scale up -- enabling developers to build and deploy highly capable, self-evolving scientific agents for arbitrary disciplines in approximately 100 lines of code. Built upon EvoMaster, we incubated the SciMaster ecosystem across domains such as machine learning, physics, and general science. Evaluations on four authoritative benchmarks (Humanity's Last Exam, MLE-Bench Lite, BrowseComp, and FrontierScience) demonstrate that EvoMaster achieves state-of-the-art scores of 41.1%, 75.8%, 73.3%, and 53.3%, respectively. It comprehensively outperforms the general-purpose baseline OpenClaw with relative improvements ranging from +159% to +316%, robustly validating its efficacy and generality as the premier foundational framework for the next generation of autonomous scientific discovery. EvoMaster is available at https://github.com/sjtu-sai-agents/EvoMaster.
2604.17406.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型和代理的融合正在催化一個新的科學發現時代：代理科學。雖然科學方法本質上是迭代的，但現有的代理框架主要是靜態的、範圍狹窄的，且缺乏從試錯中學習的能力。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了EvoMaster，一個專門為大規模代理科學設計的基礎性演變代理框架。EvoMaster以持續自我演變的核心原則為驅動，賦予代理反覆精煉假設、自我批評，並在實驗循環中逐步積累知識，忠實地反映人類的科學探究。至關重要的是，作為一個領域無關的基礎工具，EvoMaster極易擴展——使開發者能夠在約100行代碼中構建和部署高效能的自我演變科學代理，適用於任意學科。在EvoMaster的基礎上，我們在機器學習、物理學和一般科學等領域孵化了SciMaster生態系統。在四個權威基準（人類最後考試、MLE-Bench Lite、BrowseComp和FrontierScience）上的評估顯示，EvoMaster分別達到了41.1%、75.8%、73.3%和53.3%的最先進分數。它全面超越了通用基準OpenClaw，相對提升範圍從+159%到+316%，穩健地驗證了其作為下一代自主科學發現的首要基礎框架的有效性和通用性。EvoMaster可在https://github.com/sjtu-sai-agents/EvoMaster獲得。
2604.17406.author: Xinyu Zhu et.al.
2604.17406.authors: Xinyu Zhu, Yuzhu Cai, Zexi Liu, Cheng Wang, Fengyang Li, Wenkai Jin, Wanxu Liu, Zehao Bing, Bingyang Zheng, Jingyi Chai, Shuo Tang, Rui Ye, Yuwen Du, Xianghe Pang, Yaxin Du, Tingjia Miao, Yuzhi Zhang, Ruoxue Liao, Zhaohan Ding, Linfeng Zhang, Yanfeng Wang, Weinan E, Siheng Chen
